name: cross_consult_request
description: Request an architectural opinion from the architect. Available to implementors, code_reviewer, and wiring_expert at any point during a task. The workflow does not pause, but the question must be answered before the agent proceeds past the point of ambiguity.

from.description: Agent ID submitting the consultation request

context.description: Relevant code snippets, file paths, or constraints the architect needs to answer accurately

urgency.description: blocking = agent cannot proceed without the answer; non-blocking = agent can continue but needs the answer before the next stage transition
